## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Bridget (Head of People at growthx.ai) and Sam (potential recruiting hire) to discuss the company, role, and Sam's background.](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai is an AI-powered content agency, recently raised Series A, with \~$6M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Seeking 2 recruiters: 1 for technical hires, 1 for client-facing roles](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Sam has extensive recruiting experience at startups (Cardo, Handshake) and is open to joining an early-stage company](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Compensation alignment: growthx.ai's range ($150-170k) aligns with Sam's expectations ($160-180k)](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview

  - [Recently closed Series A with Marjona](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)
  - [\~30 customers, $500k MRR (\~$6M ARR)](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)
  - [Agency model running AI workflows, plans to productize technology](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [25 current team members, mostly account managers/copy editors](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Aiming for 100 employees by year-end (20-25 engineers, 10 ops, rest account team)](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)

### Business Model & Product

  - [Hybrid agency/tech approach: human-in-loop AI content generation](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Customers pay $9k-$20k/month on annual contracts](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)
  - [Example customer: Ramp (blog posts, programmatic SEO)](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Vision to expand beyond content (e.g., AI workflows for recruiting)](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)

### Role & Team Structure

  - [2 recruiter roles: 1 technical (partnered with CTO), 1 client-facing](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Reports to Bridget, hands-off management style](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Opportunity to influence AI-powered recruiting product development](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Full-time employees transitioning from contractor status on April 1st](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)

### Sam's Background

  - [Diverse recruiting experience: Cardo (60 to 400+), Code for America, Handshake (70 to 700)](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Strong generalist skills, technical recruiting spike](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Currently doing executive recruitment consulting across industries](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)

### Culture & Work Environment

  - [Remote-friendly, global hiring approach](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Focus on employee care and competitive compensation](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [Lean operations team, emphasis on versatility](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sam to meet with Daniel (CTO) to discuss vision and strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Potential meeting with Marcel (CEO) if process progresses](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=2380.0)
  - [Bridget to update Shannon (referrer) on conversation outcome](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Sam to continue research and prepare questions for Daniel](https://fathom.video/share/ANp3Lxtpo_gaqMcyKnE5txcvxCW91B9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
